allow: Bash(which psql 2>/dev/null && psql --version || echo "psql not found"; docker ps 2>/dev/null || echo "docker not running or not available")
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -c "SELECT 1 FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname='postgres'" 2>/dev/null && echo "Role exists" || echo "Need to create role")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -c "SELECT datname FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'erp_mendes'" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d erp_mendes -c "SELECT count\(*\) FROM \\"User\\"" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d erp_mendes -c "SELECT count\(*\) FROM users" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d erp_mendes -c "SELECT email, role, status FROM users" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d erp_mendes -c "SELECT email, \\"passwordHash\\" FROM users" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d erp_mendes -c "UPDATE users SET \\"passwordHash\\" = '\\$2b\\$10\\$sH.JxqomJqXbwqsfOsb/SuCQ9nX.YQXICkjsFFxRVzNxDnPcx51/a' WHERE email = 'admin@mendeserp.com.br'" 2>&1)
Bash(sleep 10 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/configuracoes && echo "" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/financeiro && echo "")

Bash(sleep 20 && curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"admin@mendeserp.com.br","password":"admin123"}' -c /tmp/cookies2.txt && echo "" && cat /tmp/cookies2.txt)
Bash(sudo service postgresql start 2>&1 && npx prisma db push 2>&1 | tail -10)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/configuracoes 2>&1 && echo " /configuracoes" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/configuracoes/canais 2>&1 && echo " /configuracoes/canais" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/configuracoes/sla 2>&1 && echo " /configuracoes/sla" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/sac/tickets 2>&1 && echo " /sac/tickets" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/financeiro/receber 2>&1 && echo " /financeiro/receber" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/financeiro/pagar 2>&1 && echo " /financeiro/pagar")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -b /tmp/cookies.txt http://localhost:3000/configuracoes 2>&1 && echo " /configuracoes" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -b /tmp/cookies.txt http://localhost:3000/configuracoes/canais 2>&1 && echo " /configuracoes/canais" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -b /tmp/cookies.txt http://localhost:3000/configuracoes/sla 2>&1 && echo " /configuracoes/sla" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -b /tmp/cookies.txt http://localhost:3000/sac/tickets 2>&1 && echo " /sac/tickets" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -b /tmp/cookies.txt http://localhost:3000/financeiro/receber 2>&1 && echo " /financeiro/receber" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -b /tmp/cookies.txt http://localhost:3000/financeiro/pagar 2>&1 && echo " /financeiro/pagar")
